# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: KongGateway
metadata:
  name: my-kong-gateway

routes:
  - name: users-service
    paths:
      - /users
    service:
      id: users-service
      protocol: http
      host: users-service:80
      connect_timeout: 60000
      read_timeout: 30000
      write_timeout: 30000
      retries: 5

  - name: products-service
    paths:
      - /products
    service:
      id: products-service
      protocol: http
      host: products-service:80
      connect_timeout: 60000
      read_timeout: 30000
      write_timeout: 30000
      retries: 5

services:
  - id: users-service
    name: users-service
    host: users-service:80
    port: 80
    protocol: http

  - id: products-service
    name: products-service
    host: products-service:80
    port: 80
    protocol: http

consumers:
  - username: my-consumer
    custom_id: my-consumer-id

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_in_query_name: my-key
